title: nothoholcus
intro: Nothoholcus is a genus of flowering plants in the family Asparagaceae, commonly known as the lilyturf or lily-grass. Nothoholcus has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nothoholcus include the potential to reduce swelling and promote wound healing, as well as its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds and fever. Nothoholcus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
